task:
MuseScore 3 is already open with /home/user/Documents/fanfare.mscz — 4 measures of quarter notes with Composer set to 'Anonymous'.

Set the Composer to exactly 'Test Composer' and save so the updated composer is written into /home/user/Documents/fanfare.mscz. Then export the score to all three of these formats at exactly these paths:
- Standard MIDI File: /home/user/Documents/fanfare.mid
- Uncompressed MusicXML: /home/user/Documents/fanfare.musicxml
- PDF File: /home/user/Documents/fanfare.pdf

The original fanfare.mscz must still exist with the updated composer. The MIDI must contain at least 2 notes, the MusicXML must have at least 1 part, and the PDF must have a valid %PDF- header.

verification.description: Exported fanfare.pdf exists and has %PDF- header
